ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* The name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester" TEXT /* The semester in which the student took the course */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year in which the student took the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* The grade the student received for the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor who taught the course */,
  "final_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the final exam */,
  "midterm_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the midterm exam */,
  "final_exam_score" INTEGER /* Score of the final exam */,
  "midterm_exam_score" INTEGER /* Score of the midterm exam */,
  "attendance_percentage" TEXT /* Attendance percentage of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_records_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* The full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the student */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* The department the student is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled in the university */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year the student graduated */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* Cumulative GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* The full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* The department the instructor belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* The name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
